title: JSONB extraction in fragments with typed cast
prompt: Write `MyApp.Blog.posts_with_meta_title/0` where Posts have a JSONB `metadata` column. Extract `metadata->>'title'` as a string and select it as `meta_title`. Use `fragment("? ->> 'title'", p.metadata)` inside a `select:`. Also filter WHERE `metadata ? 'title'` (field exists) — note the `?` must be escaped as `\?` in the fragment literal since `?` is the placeholder marker. Write to `lib/my_app/blog.ex`.
tier_rationale: JSONB operators + the escaped `?` gotcha. Quite niche.
